serviceNotes: Access via service entrance on Huron St. Key fob on file. Do not service executive floor before 9 AM. Scented products not permitted near executive suite.
actionItems: Resolve open high-severity complaint — customer escalated restroom cleanliness
Sensitive event still within decay window — follow up with building management
New cleaner assigned 7 days ago — schedule onboarding check-in
Overdue customer request — deep clean conference room B

serviceNotes: Bi-weekly schedule: alternating Tuesdays and Fridays. Parking in Annex garage — ask security for pass. Alarm code on file with ops team.
Monthly pressure wash of all levels. Schedule after business hours (after 8 PM). Contact Tom 24 hrs in advance for gate access.
Service window: Fri 6 PM – 10 PM. Cleaning crew must sign in at security desk. No access to server room on 3rd floor. Green cleaning products required per campus policy.
Clean after store close — earliest start time 9 PM. Use rear entrance on Maple Ave. Restocking crew may still be present after 11 PM; coordinate schedule.
actionItems: Follow up on open complaint — customer reported damaged merchandise area

serviceNotes: HIPAA-compliant staff only. All cleaners must complete hospital-specific onboarding before first shift. ICU and OR corridors require supervisor sign-off before each clean. Biohazard disposal handled separately — do NOT mix with general waste.
actionItems: High-severity complaint — late arrival with no notification
New cleaner assigned 22 days ago — in yellow monitoring window
Open customer request — ICU waiting room deep clean pending approval
QC inspection needs attention — ICU hallway and break room below threshold

serviceNotes: Weekly Thursday service. Cleaning crew badge access provisioned. Kitchen on 2nd floor off-limits due to renovation through May 2026. Client prefers unscented products.
Same contract as Building 1. Service on Fridays. Building 2 has a loading dock that must remain clear — park service vehicles on east side only.

dealName: Harbor View Hotel — Lobby & Common Areas
serviceNotes: Daily 2 AM – 6 AM service window for lobby and common areas. Crew must use freight elevator (key with front desk). High-visibility uniform required at all times. Guest-facing areas must be complete by 6 AM for morning rush.
actionItems: Sensitive event with Red impact — site locked to Red tier until resolved
Open complaint — guest complaint about common area cleanliness
New contact person — 23 days into 59-day Red window

serviceNotes: No service during member events — check calendar in clubhouse office before each visit. Locker rooms require towel service coordination with front desk.
Weekly Saturday morning clean. Loading dock active until 10 AM — delay floor clean until dock is clear. Forklift areas must be marked safe before cleaning.

Trading floor service window: 7 PM – 11 PM weekdays. Crew must clear trading floor by 11 PM — early market prep begins at 11:30 PM. All electronics must remain covered. Background check required for all staff.
Bi-weekly Thursday service. Lab access requires EHS escort — contact Dr. Park 48 hrs in advance. Chemical storage areas cleaned by certified hazmat-trained staff only. No wet mops in dry lab zones.
Showroom floor waxed first Tuesday of every month. Service bay cleaning includes grease trap areas — requires industrial degreaser. Do not move vehicles without manager authorization.
Multi-tenant building — coordinate with tenant reps for after-hours access. Server rooms on floors 4 and 7 are off-limits. Security escort required for any floor above 8.
Same property as Tower A. Tower B has a fitness center on the ground floor — service after 10 PM. Shared loading dock with Tower A; avoid scheduling both buildings same night.

Daily morning service 6 AM – 10 AM. Resident corridors must be cleaned quietly — no loud equipment before 8 AM. Memory care wing requires dedicated staff trained on dementia-sensitive protocols. All staff must sign in at front desk.
actionItems: High-severity complaint outstanding — resident family reported repeated cleanliness issues
New cleaner assigned 4 days ago — in Red monitoring window (0–7d)
Open SM internal request — floor buffer replacement pending

serviceNotes: East Wing includes oncology and surgical prep. All cleaners require hospital ID badge. Sharps and medical waste handled by hospital staff — do not touch. Supervisor walk-through required at start and end of each shift.
actionItems: Open medium-severity complaint — nursing station sanitization protocol not followed

serviceNotes: New contract as of Jan 2026. Weekly Wednesday evening service. Lobby and elevator bank are top priority. Tenant on 12th floor has requested no service after 9 PM — skip that floor if running late.
Service after school hours, no earlier than 4 PM. Nurse's office requires separate cleaning protocol with EPA-approved disinfectants. Do not disturb classroom setup.
Service after store close — no earlier than 10 PM. Deli and produce prep areas require food-safe cleaning products. Floors must be dry before overnight staff arrive at 5 AM.
HIPAA-compliant staff required. Operatory rooms cleaned per dental infection control protocol. Sharps containers handled by medical waste vendor — do not touch. Service window: evenings after 6 PM.

Confidential document areas must not be disturbed. Clean all conference rooms by 7 AM before first client meetings. Partner offices require prior authorization before entry. Background check required for all assigned staff.
Service window: Sundays 11 PM – 4 AM when gym is closed. Focus on locker rooms, showers, and equipment floors. High-touch surfaces require EPA-registered disinfectants per fitness center policy.

Monday morning deep clean after weekend service. Kitchen hood cleaning separate — handled by specialized vendor. All food-contact surfaces require NSF-approved cleaning products. Grease trap inspection coordinate with Henry.

Operations center and administration building covered. Security clearance required for all staff — process takes 2 weeks. Daily early morning service 3 AM – 7 AM before commuter shift. High-traffic restrooms require mid-day check.

Daily evening service after clinic closes at 7 PM. Exam rooms and surgery suite require hospital-grade disinfectants. Animal holding areas cleaned by trained vet staff — cleaning crew handles lobby, offices, and hallways only. No fragranced products.

Weekly Sunday night service 11 PM – 5 AM. Pool deck and locker rooms are priority areas. Equipment floors require EPA-registered disinfectant spray. Do not enter the sauna room — managed by facility staff.

Service on Mondays after Sunday services. Sanctuary requires reverent handling — no equipment noise during any scheduled services. Children's wing cleaned with fragrance-free, non-toxic products only. Kitchen available for crew break.

FDA-regulated facility. All cleaning staff require background check and facility badge. Clean rooms and lab areas staffed by certified cleaners only. No personal items brought past security checkpoint. SDS documentation on file with ops team.

Weekly service covers lobby, hallways, laundry room, and common areas only — not individual units. Resident notification required 24 hrs before any schedule change. Elevator service only — no stairwell shortcut to unit floors during service.

Production floor and office building covered. Service on weekends only when plant is at reduced capacity. Steel-toed shoes required for production floor. Hazardous material zones off-limits — clean only marked green zones.

Service after closing hours — 9 PM earliest. Children's reading room requires non-toxic, fragrance-free products. Quiet equipment only — no loud vacuums permitted after 10 PM due to residential proximity. Book collection areas: no sprays, dust only.

Service covers common areas, restrooms, and food court. No service during peak hours — evenings after 10 PM only. Food court cleaning requires food-safe products. Coordinate with security for exterior door access.

Daily early morning service 5 AM – 8 AM before member peak hours. Locker rooms, pool deck, and weight floor are priority. Member-facing areas must be spotless by 6 AM. EPA-registered disinfectants required for all high-touch surfaces.

HIPAA compliance required. Exam rooms cleaned to CDPH infection control standards. All staff credentialed before first day. Waiting room and check-in area must be complete before 7:30 AM for first patients. No fragranced products.

dealName: Emerald Coast Tech Hub — Weekly Service
serviceNotes: Weekly Thursday evening service. Open office floor plan — all standing desks must be lowered before cleaning. Server room off-limits. Whiteboards are not to be erased. NDA for all cleaning staff required — coordinate with Tina before onboarding new cleaners.

dealName: Fox Valley Industrial Park — Weekly Service
serviceNotes: Weekly Saturday service. Office suites and common areas only — warehouse bays handled by tenants. Loading dock restrooms included. Parking lot sweeping separate scope. Steel-toed shoes required on premises.

Service window: Friday evenings 8 PM – midnight. All cleaning products must be Green Seal certified per university sustainability policy. Admissions office on 2nd floor has special access restriction. Sign in at campus security before each visit.

Weekly Friday service covers clubhouse, restrooms, and boat launch facilities. Marine-safe cleaning products required — no phosphates near water access points. Service paused during winter months December–March per seasonal schedule.

Office and engineering lab areas. Environmentally-conscious client — green certified products mandatory. No single-use plastics in supply delivery. R&D lab requires special access clearance from Abby 24 hrs ahead.
Background check mandatory for all staff — submit 2 weeks before first shift. No photography on premises. Secure areas on B1 level off-limits. All cleaning logs must be signed and retained on-site.

Main branch and executive floors. Service window: 7 PM – 11 PM on banking days. Security escort required after 9 PM. Vault corridor off-limits — clean up to marked line only. Background check and bonding required for all staff.

Daily morning service 6 AM – 10 AM. Memory care unit requires staff trained in dementia-sensitive protocols — separate from general crew. No strong fragrances. All staff must check in with front desk before beginning work. Resident privacy strictly maintained.

Weekly Monday service when club is closed to members. Clubhouse, pro shop, locker rooms, and dining area covered. Service paused during major tournament weekends — check calendar with Phillip. Premium cleaning products with no visible scent residue required.

Multi-tenant office complex. Weekly Tuesday evening service. Coordinate with individual tenant reps for after-hours access codes. Lobby and shared conference rooms are common area responsibility — suite interiors billed separately per tenant.

Daily 1 AM – 6 AM service for lobby, bar, and event spaces. All crew in full uniform at all times. Guest-facing surfaces must pass white glove standard by 6:30 AM. Hotel management reserves right to conduct random inspections. Coordinate with overnight front desk for access.

Service after 4 PM on school days — no disruption to after-school programs. Non-toxic, fragrance-free products required in all classrooms and cafeteria. Restrooms require EPA-registered disinfectants. Do not remove anything from teacher desks or bulletin boards.

Class A downtown tower. Daily service 6 PM – midnight. Lobby must pass concierge walk-through before 7 PM. Executive suite on 38th floor requires separate cleaning log and supervisor sign-off. Unscented products only — tenant request.

Weekly Wednesday service. Sensitive client data visible in open office — all staff must have signed NDA on file. Claims processing floor has restricted access. Cleaning logs retained for compliance audit purposes. No fragrance products anywhere in building.

Tier 3 data center. All staff require background check and SOC 2 compliance badge. Server halls off-limits — clean office, hallways, and break rooms only. No liquids near raised floor areas. Anti-static cleaning equipment only. Daily log submitted to security.

Weekly Sunday night service 11 PM – 4 AM. Locker rooms and pool deck top priority. EPA-registered disinfectants for all equipment. Customer towels are handled by facility staff — cleaning crew does not touch. Steam room off-limits.

Office, break rooms, and restrooms only — warehouse cleaning handled internally. Saturday service to avoid weekday distribution traffic. Food-safe cleaning products required in break room and kitchen area. Dock restrooms included in scope.

Multi-specialty medical office building. HIPAA-compliant staff required. Daily service 7 PM – 11 PM. Each suite cleaned per individual tenant spec — master sheet on file with supervisor. Common areas and restrooms included. Blood-borne pathogen training required.
